# Resources

24 resource types derived from `#[derive(Resource)]`.

## `src/components/coordination.rs`

### CoordinatorDied (struct)

> Inserted when a coordinator dies, triggering immediate re-evaluation.

## `src/components/prey.rs`

### PreyDensity (struct)

> Per-species population density (pop / cap), updated once per tick in `prey_population`. Read by the pounce formula for density-dependent vulnerability.

## `src/resources/aspiration_registry.rs`

### AspirationRegistry (struct)

> All aspiration chains available in the simulation, loaded from RON files.

## `src/resources/colony_hunting_map.rs`

### ColonyHuntingMap (struct)

> Colony-wide shared hunting belief map. Updated through social transmission when cats interact — individual experience feeds into collective knowledge.  All cats can read this map as a baseline. Individual `HuntingPriors` on each cat overlay personal experience on top.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `beliefs` | `HuntingPriors` |

## `src/resources/colony_knowledge.rs`

### ColonyKnowledge (struct)

> Collective knowledge shared across the colony. Entries are promoted from individual cat memories when 3+ cats hold the same memory. Colony knowledge decays much more slowly than individual memory and provides colony-wide utility modifiers to AI scoring.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `entries` | `Vec<KnowledgeEntry>` |
| `recently_forgotten` | `HashMap<String, u64>` |

## `src/resources/colony_priority.rs`

### ColonyPriority (struct)

> Colony-wide priority set by the player via the P key.  Applies a mild utility bonus (+0.15) to actions aligned with the priority, nudging cat behavior without overriding critical needs.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `active` | `Option<PriorityKind>` |

## `src/resources/colony_score.rs`

### ColonyScore (struct)

> Cumulative ledger of colony-wide achievements and milestones.  Point-in-time welfare axes are computed fresh each emission by the `emit_colony_score` system — they don't live here. This resource only tracks counters that accumulate over the life of a simulation run.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `seasons_survived` | `u64` |
| `bonds_formed` | `u64` |
| `peak_population` | `u64` |
| `deaths_starvation` | `u64` |
| `deaths_old_age` | `u64` |
| `deaths_injury` | `u64` |
| `aspirations_completed` | `u64` |
| `structures_built` | `u64` |
| `kittens_born` | `u64` |
| `prey_dens_discovered` | `u64` |
| `last_recorded_season` | `u64` |

## `src/resources/event_log.rs`

### EventLog (struct)

> Ring-buffer of structured simulation events for debugging.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `entries` | `VecDeque<EventEntry>` |
| `capacity` | `usize` |
| `total_pushed` | `u64` |

## `src/resources/food.rs`

### FoodStores (struct)

> Colony food supply. Cats deposit food from hunting/foraging and consume it when eating. Spoils slowly each tick.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `current` | `f32` |
| `capacity` | `f32` |
| `spoilage_rate` | `f32` |
| `spoilage_multiplier` | `f32` |

## `src/resources/map.rs`

### TileMap (struct)

> The world map. Stored as a flat `Vec<Tile>` in row-major order.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `width` | `i32` |
| `height` | `i32` |

## `src/resources/narrative.rs`

### NarrativeLog (struct)

> Ring-buffer of recent narrative entries. Oldest entries are dropped once `capacity` is exceeded.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `entries` | `VecDeque<NarrativeEntry>` |
| `capacity` | `usize` |
| `total_pushed` | `u64` |

## `src/resources/narrative_templates.rs`

### TemplateRegistry (struct)

## `src/resources/relationships.rs`

### Relationships (struct)

> Colony-wide relationship graph. Symmetric: `get(a, b)` and `get(b, a)` always return the same entry.

## `src/resources/rng.rs`

### SimRng (struct)

> Deterministic RNG resource for the simulation.  All random decisions during a simulation run should draw from this single resource so that results are fully reproducible given the same seed.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `rng` | `ChaCha8Rng` |

### SimConstants (struct)

| Field | Type |

| `needs` | `NeedsConstants` |
| `buildings` | `BuildingConstants` |
| `combat` | `CombatConstants` |

| `death` | `DeathConstants` |

## `src/resources/snapshot_config.rs`

### SnapshotConfig (struct)

> Controls emission rates for diagnostic event log channels.  Each interval is in simulation ticks. A value of 0 disables that channel. CLI flags `--trace-positions <N>` and `--snapshot-interval <N>` override the defaults.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `full_snapshot_interval` | `u64` |
| `position_trace_interval` | `u64` |
| `economy_interval` | `u64` |

## `src/resources/system_activation.rs`

### SystemActivation (struct)

> Tracks how many times each simulation feature meaningfully fires.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `counts` | `HashMap<Feature, u64>` |

## `src/resources/time.rs`

### TransitionTracker (struct)

> Tracks previous-tick state so systems can detect transitions and emit narratives. `None` values on the first tick prevent spurious emissions.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `last_weather` | `Option<Weather>` |

### SimConfig (struct)

> Simulation configuration constants. Stored as a resource; inject this into any system that needs to convert raw ticks into human-readable time.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `ticks_per_day_phase` | `u64` |
| `ticks_per_season` | `u64` |
| `seed` | `u64` |

### TimeState (struct)

> Global simulation clock. Advance `tick` each update; everything else is derived.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `tick` | `u64` |
| `paused` | `bool` |
| `speed` | `SimSpeed` |

## `src/resources/weather.rs`

### WeatherState (struct)

> ECS resource tracking current weather and when it will next change.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `current` | `Weather` |
| `ticks_until_change` | `u64` |

## `src/resources/wind.rs`

### WindState (struct)

> Global wind direction and strength. Affects scent carry for hunting and adds environmental flavor to narrative.  Wind rotates slowly over time and couples to weather: storms randomize direction and boost strength; calm weather dampens it.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `angle` | `f32` |
| `strength` | `f32` |

## `src/resources/zodiac.rs`

### ZodiacData (struct)

> Colony-wide zodiac compatibility matrix loaded from `assets/data/zodiac.ron`.

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `signs` | `HashMap<ZodiacSign, SignData>` |

## `src/species/mod.rs`

### SpeciesRegistry (struct)

> Resource holding all prey species profiles for systems that need to iterate (population management, world gen, den lifecycle).

| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `profiles` | `Vec<Box<dyn PreyProfile>>` |
